checks.description: Guardrail for edge case: avoid fixed-cycle expectations; any observable change after operation must be consistent with conservative progress.
checks.pass_condition: No safety property is violated by assuming a specific latency; the design may update result and o_en at any cycle after the operation, but must eventually reflect a correct sum for boundary inputs.
checks.trigger_condition: When the plan applies edge-case stimulus to adda and addb.

checks.description: Functional correctness of a single enabled addition: result must eventually equal adda + addb and o_en must assert to indicate validity.
checks.pass_condition: After i_en is asserted with a legal operand pair, result and o_en transition to a stable, non-X state that reflects the correct sum; the exact cycle of transition is not required.
checks.trigger_condition: When the basic_001 case drives i_en high with representative operands.
